description_long: This bungalow features a modern, low-profile design with a flat, overhanging roof and a large wooden deck that surrounds a central swimming pool. The main structure is compact, with white exterior walls and large windows that allow for ample natural light. The deck is adorned with potted plants and decorative lighting at the corners, enhancing its inviting atmosphere. A wooden walkway leads up to the entrance, which is slightly recessed and sheltered by the roof. The pool wraps around two sides of the house, and there is a circular hot tub or spa area integrated into the deck. The landscaping is minimal, with green grass borders and a few accent plants, emphasizing the clean, contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern bungalow with a flat roof, white walls, and a large wooden deck surrounding a central pool and hot tub, accented by potted plants and minimal landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wooden walkway, and the pool wrapping around the house with potted plants and lighting at the corners.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the hot tub area, grouped windows, and the continuation of the deck and pool around the structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, more of the pool, and the symmetry of the deck and landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the roof overhang, additional potted plants, and the deck's extension around the house.
